features: TOP QUALITY MATERIALS: Our single flower wrapping bag is made of opp plastic, waterproof and sturdy, which can protect the flowers well from being squeezed.
DIMENSIONS: Each of flower wraps is 17.7 x 4.9 x 1.6 inches and the length of ribbon is 72ft.
Attractive Appearance: Our flower packaging bag has diamond-cut patterns with a clear window, making the flowers more fashionable.
EASY TO USE: Trapezoidal design of plastic flower wrap helps to pack the flower easily, which also allows the stems to get water when placed in buckets.

WIDE APPLICATIONS: Our single flower sleeves are PERFECT for flower retail store, floral arrangement supplies, Mother's day, Valentine's Day, graduation, proposal, wedding, bridal shower, birthday, funeral, Christmas, baby shower, anniversary, fundraiser / foundation event, New year, holidays party, decoration and shot.
description: Specifications: Material: OPP Plastic Color: White Quantity: 100 Size: 4.9 x 1.6 x 17.7 inches Length of Ribbon: 72 ft Package Includes: 100pcs single rose sleeves 72ft gold edge ribbon
